title: ACT Subtree envelope
description: Per PRD-100-R32, PRD-100-R33, PRD-100-R34, PRD-100-R35. A node and its inlined descendants up to a documented depth. Default depth 3, max 8 (PRD-100-R33). Subtree is Standard-tier (PRD-107-R8). Depth-first pre-order with root first (PRD-100-R35) is not expressible in JSON Schema; PRD-600 enforces it programmatically.

root.description: Per PRD-100-R10, PRD-100-R32. ID of the root node of this subtree. Variant-ID extension per PRD-102-R29 (amendment A6).

depth.description: Number of generations included below root. 0 means root only.

truncated.description: True when descendants were elided because the documented max depth was reached. PRD-100 sets max depth to 8.

nodes.description: Full node envelopes for the root and each included descendant. Order MUST be depth-first pre-order with the root first.
